headline: The $13 Billion World Cup: Inside FIFA’s Massive Moneymaking Play
summary: The 2026 World Cup, to be played in North America, has been called the equivalent of 104 Super Bowls in a month. Who stands to gain—and what it will cost fans.

raw.headline: The $13 Billion World Cup: Inside FIFA’s Massive Moneymaking Play
raw.summary: The 2026 World Cup, to be played in North America, has been called the equivalent of 104 Super Bowls in a month. Who stands to gain—and what it will cost fans.

headline: Grayscale Files For Canton ETF, Targeting A Token Where 100 Wallets Hold 89% Of Supply
summary: Large-scale sales or distributions by major holders could hurt the token's market price and the trust's shares, Grayscale warned.
